feed.title: Somerset County Registry of Deeds
feed.subtitle: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. Domain is hyphenated 'somersetcounty-me.org'; monitors fee-schedule content.

entry.title: Page updated: Somerset County Registry of Deeds
entry.content:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - Ph: 207-474-9861 - Open Hours: Mon - Fri 8:00 am - 4:00 pm - Home - Government - Communities - Documents - Agendas - RFP’s and Open Bids - Minutes - Other - Employment - Employment Application - Notify Me - County Charter - Services - Cooperative Extension - Skowhegan Outdoors - Soil & Water Conservation District - Economic Development Corporation - Departments - Administration - Budget Committee - Communications - County Commissioners - District Attorney’s Office - Emergency Management - Finance Department - Human Resources - Information Technology - Maintenance - Probate Office - Registry of Deeds - Sheriff’s Office & Jail - Unorganized Territories - Press Resources - Report an Issue - Registry of Deeds - Home - Registry of Deeds - All Departments - Administration - Budget Committee - Communications - County Commissioners - District Attorney's Office - Emergency Management - Finance Department - Human Resources - Information Technology - Maintenance - Probate Office - Registry of Deeds - Unorganized Territories - Somerset County - Registry of Deeds - The Deeds Office plays a crucial role in preserving the county’s heritage and facilitating real estate transactions with efficiency and accuracy. - Our Services: - Recordings: - We welcome property recordings from 8:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m. Monday through Friday. Our dedicated staff ensures that each docu [diff truncated]
